description: Isolated Features - Next.js-style feature folder isolation

expectedViolations.suggestion: Features are isolated and cannot import from each other. Move shared code to components/shared/.
Features are isolated and cannot import from each other. Move shared code to components/shared/.

notes: Features are isolated: auth, billing, dashboard cannot import each other
Shared folder is NOT isolated: shared can import from shared
Flow rule features -> shared allows features to use shared components
This pattern is common in Next.js and modern React apps
